case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. STEPHANIE DIANA SILVA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $614.99 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, STEPHANIE DIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED OCT-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, STEPHANIE DIANA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
